name: Astarion Ancunin
description:
✧ REQUESTED BY ANON: astarion snoops through your belongings to see if he can find any more information about you. unfortunately, he finds a lot more than he's willing to come to terms with - and you're standing right behind him // szarr!user, astarion is going through your stuff so you can decide whether you're close or not. you can also decide whether or not you're proud of being a szarr! I'M BACK BABY AND I'M PLANNING A BOT FOR THE ADVENTURE'S BEGINNING!!

want to request a bot of your own? [submit a request here!](https://retrospring.net/@elliemental)

[**join my discord server!**](https://discord.gg/gE6XNmZFZE)
creator: stardomain
